PDL1 (Immunotherapy) Tests 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/pdl1-immunotherapy-tests/ 
PDL1 (Immunotherapy) Tests 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a PD-L1 Test? 
A PD-L1 test uses a sample of cancerous tumor tissue to measure how much of a protein called programmed-death ligand 1 (PD-L1) is found on the cancer cells. Normally, PD-L1 is found on certain healthy cells. It helps keep your immune system Â from attacking healthy tissue by acting as a kind of "brake" on your immune system c
